common.room_editor_intro: Turn on rooms to include them. Drag or use the arrows to set the cleaning order.

abort.already_configured: This robot is already set up.
abort.already_in_progress: Setup is already running — return to the open dialog.
abort.bluetooth_unavailable: Pairing needs a Bluetooth adapter built into or plugged into this Home Assistant machine — Bluetooth proxies cannot run setup. Resolve any Bluetooth repair under Settings → System → Repairs, then try again.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the robot. Check that it is powered on and on the same network, then start setup again.
abort.invalid_certificate: The robot's identity could not be verified.
abort.invalid_credential: The robot rejected the saved local access.
abort.pairing_session_expired: The pairing session ended. Start setup again.

error.bluetooth_unavailable: Pairing needs a Bluetooth adapter built into or plugged into this Home Assistant machine — Bluetooth proxies cannot run setup. Resolve any Bluetooth repair under Settings → System → Repairs, then try again.
error.cannot_connect: Could not connect to the robot. Check that it is powered on and on the same network, then try again.
error.invalid_certificate: The robot's identity could not be verified.
error.invalid_credential: The robot rejected the saved local access. Pairing again will issue a new one.
error.invalid_passkey: Enter all six digits shown on the robot's screen.
error.pairing_code_expired: That code expired, so a new pairing was started. Enter the new code the robot is showing right away.
error.pairing_code_rejected: The robot did not accept that code, so a new pairing was started. Enter the new code the robot is showing right away.
error.pairing_incomplete: Pairing started but did not finish. Keep the robot near Home Assistant's Bluetooth adapter, turn Pairing mode off and on, then try again.
error.pairing_mode_confirmation_required: Turn on Pairing mode first, then check the box to continue.
error.pairing_mode_off: Home Assistant's local Bluetooth adapter did not receive a fresh pairing advertisement. Turn Pairing mode off and on, put the adapter within a few feet of Matic with minimal obstruction, temporarily disable Bluetooth proxies, then try again.
error.pairing_timeout: Pairing did not finish within five minutes. Turn Pairing mode off and on, put Home Assistant's local Bluetooth adapter within a few feet of Matic, temporarily disable Bluetooth proxies, and try again. If it still misses the robot, reload or replug the adapter. Details are in Settings → System → Logs.

discovery_failed.description: Check that the robot is powered on and on the same network as Home Assistant.
discovery_failed.title: No Matic robot found

select_robot.description: More than one robot was found. Pick the one to add.
select_robot.title: Choose your Matic

manual.description: Home Assistant verifies the robot's identity before anything is saved.
manual.title: Enter the robot's address

pair.description: Put Home Assistant's local Bluetooth adapter within a few feet of Matic. In the Matic app, go to Settings → Connectivity → Add another user and turn on Pairing mode. Confirm below only after the pairing window is open. The robot will display a six-digit code and Home Assistant will ask for it.
pair.title: Connect your Matic

data_description.passkey: Home Assistant never saves the code.

pairing_code.description: Type the six-digit code from the robot's screen now — it expires after about 20 seconds.
pairing_code.title: Enter the code shown on Matic

reauth_confirm.description: Put Home Assistant's local Bluetooth adapter within a few feet of Matic. In the Matic app, go to Settings → Connectivity → Add another user and turn on Pairing mode. Confirm below only after the pairing window is open. The robot will display a six-digit code and Home Assistant will ask for it before replacing its local access.
reauth_confirm.title: Restore local access

reconfigure.description: Home Assistant verifies it is the same robot before saving.
reconfigure.title: Update robot address

progress.wait_for_pairing: Looking for your Matic… Keep Pairing mode open on the robot.
progress.connecting: Connecting to your Matic… When it displays a six-digit code, this screen will ask for it.
progress.verifying: Verifying the code and finishing setup…

abort.entry_not_loaded: The robot must be online to manage cleaning plans. Open Configure again once it reconnects.

error.confirmation_required: Check the confirmation box to continue.
error.duplicate_plan: Use a unique plan name with at least one letter or number.
error.invalid_plan: This plan cannot run with its current settings or room map.
error.no_rooms: Turn on at least one room.

init.title: Cleaning plans
init.description: Reusable room plans for dashboards and automations. Default plan: {selected_plan}. Saved plans: {plan_count}.

data_description.plan: The default plan is marked in the list.

add_plan.title: Create a cleaning plan
add_plan.description: Name the plan, pick how it runs, then turn on any of the robot's {room_count} rooms — all settings save together on this screen. Every room starts off; included rooms default to Vacuum and Standard.

data_description.name: Shown in dashboards and automations — for example Away, Weekdays, or Deep clean.
data_description.run_behavior: Intelligent rotation favors rooms that have waited longest and suits short runs. Saved order always runs from top to bottom.
data_description.room_editor: Turn on a room to include it and set its options. The list is the exact order for Run all and saved-order cleaning.
data_description.return_to_base: Dock the robot after the plan finishes.

data_description.name: Shown in dashboards, automations, and plan management.
data_description.run_behavior: Intelligent rotation favors rooms that have waited longest and suits short runs. Saved order always runs from top to bottom.
data_description.room_editor: Turn on a room to include it and set its options. The list is the exact order for Run all and saved-order cleaning.
data_description.enabled: Disabled plans stay saved but cannot start.
data_description.return_to_base: Dock the robot after the plan finishes.

delete_plan.title: Delete plan
delete_plan.description: Submitting permanently deletes {plan_name}. Other plans keep their history.

reset_history.title: Reset cleaning history
reset_history.description: Submitting clears which rooms {plan_name} has completed. Plans and room settings are kept; affected rooms are treated as never cleaned.

clean_entire_plan.name: Clean all rooms in default plan

no_robot_target.message: Select at least one loaded Matic vacuum.

no_rooms.message: Select at least one Matic room.

ordered_must_be_boolean.message: Clean in order must be true or false.

plan_already_running.message: A managed Matic cleaning plan is already running.

plan_not_running.message: No managed Matic cleaning plan is running.

invalid_plan.message: The saved cleaning plan is invalid: {error}

robot_unavailable.message: The selected Matic robot is unavailable.

robot_error.message: The selected Matic robot reported an error.

room_plan_unavailable.message: The robot's room map is unavailable.

rooms_must_be_list.message: Rooms must be a list of room names or IDs.

unsupported_command.message: That Matic command is not supported. Use start, clean_all, clean_rooms, clean_segments, pause, resume, stop, dock, or return_home.

firmware_regression.title: Matic firmware compatibility changed
firmware_regression.description: After Matic updated from {previous} to {current}, {count} Hermes endpoint(s) changed availability or transport status. Review the **Firmware snapshot** response and compatibility ledger.

robot_identity_changed.title: Matic robot identity changed
robot_identity_changed.description: The device at the configured Matic address presented a TLS certificate that does not match the pinned robot identity. Communication is blocked until the certificate matches again. If the robot was factory reset or replaced, re-pair it through **Settings > Devices & Services > Matic Robot > Reconfigure**.

clean.name: Clean
clean.description: Starts a cleaning run with the selected rooms, mode, coverage, and order.

rooms.name: Rooms
rooms.description: Room names or stable room IDs in the desired order. Omit this field to clean every mapped room.

cleaning_mode.name: Cleaning mode
cleaning_mode.description: Cleaning system for this run. Omit it to use Default cleaning mode.

coverage_setting.name: Coverage
coverage_setting.description: Coverage for this run. Omit it to use Default coverage.

ordered.name: Clean in order
ordered.description: Clean rooms in the supplied order.

intelligent_clean.name: Intelligent cleaning
intelligent_clean.description: Starts with rooms that have waited longest since a successful clean, then continues until stopped or every selected room finishes. Unfinished rooms remain due.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Omit it to use the default plan.

clean_entire_plan.name: Clean entire plan
clean_entire_plan.description: Runs the default or named plan once from top to bottom, using each room's saved settings.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Omit it to use the default plan.

run_selected_plan.name: Run plan with saved behavior
run_selected_plan.description: Runs the default or named plan using its saved cleaning behavior.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Omit it to use the default plan.

preview_plan.name: Preview next plan run
preview_plan.description: Shows which rooms the next plan run would clean without starting the robot or changing history.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Omit it to use the default plan.

stop_intelligent_cleaning.name: Stop cleaning plan
stop_intelligent_cleaning.description: Stops the plan, leaves the current room due, and sends the robot to its dock.

reset_plan_history.name: Reset cleaning history
reset_plan_history.description: Clears room completion history without deleting plans or room settings.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Plan name or stable ID. Omit it to use the default plan.

all_plans.name: Reset history for every plan
all_plans.description: Clear intelligent-cleaning history for every plan.

list_plans.name: List cleaning plans
list_plans.description: Returns saved plans, rooms, room settings, IDs, and the default plan.

save_plan.name: Create or replace cleaning plan
save_plan.description: Creates a plan or replaces an existing plan with the same ID.

plan_id.name: Plan ID
plan_id.description: Stable ID to replace; omit to derive it from the name.

run_behavior.name: Cleaning order
run_behavior.description: Intelligent rotation starts with rooms that have waited longest; the saved order breaks ties. Run all cleans every selected room from top to bottom.

rooms.name: Rooms and settings
rooms.description: Ordered mapped rooms with individual cleaning mode and coverage settings.

return_to_base.name: Return to dock when finished
return_to_base.description: Send the robot to its dock after all selected rooms finish successfully.

select.name: Use as default plan
select.description: Use this plan when an action does not name one.

start_timeout.name: Start timeout
start_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for each room to start cleaning.

completion_timeout.name: Room completion timeout
completion_timeout.description: Seconds to wait for each room to finish.

delete_plan.name: Delete cleaning plan
delete_plan.description: Deletes one plan by stable ID or exact name.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

select_plan.name: Set default cleaning plan
select_plan.description: Sets the plan used when an action, entity, or button does not name one.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

save_plan_room.name: Add or update plan room
save_plan_room.description: Adds one mapped room or updates that room's individual settings.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room and settings
room.description: Mapped room with its cleaning mode and coverage setting.

delete_plan_room.name: Remove room from plan
delete_plan_room.description: Removes one mapped room and its settings from a plan.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room
room.description: Mapped room name or stable room ID.

move_plan_room.name: Move room in plan
move_plan_room.description: Changes one mapped room's saved position.

plan.name: Cleaning plan
plan.description: Stable plan ID or exact name.

room.name: Room
room.description: Mapped room name or stable room ID.

new_position.name: New position
new_position.description: New position in the room list, where 1 is the top.

inspect_hermes_endpoint.name: Inspect Hermes endpoint
inspect_hermes_endpoint.description: Reads payload-free sizes and SHA-256 fingerprints from a supported local Hermes endpoint. Credential endpoints are blocked.

endpoint.name: Endpoint
endpoint.description: Local Hermes property or collection to inspect.

firmware_snapshot.name: Firmware snapshot
firmware_snapshot.description: Checks every known non-credential Hermes endpoint, stores a payload-free weekly compatibility record, and reports changes from the prior snapshot.
